_meta.warning: This file is a KISS schema and starter dataset. Do not use as a real coverage source until each row is researched and source_quality is updated.

external_patient_letter_references.lillydirect: Official LillyDirect may offer branded Lilly medicines/self-pay pathways depending on drug and eligibility.
external_patient_letter_references.hiebers: Hieber's Pharmacy is a Pittsburgh pharmacy/compounding pharmacy; compounded GLP options require clinician/pharmacist review and current legal/safety verification. Do not present compounded GLPs as equivalent to FDA-approved branded products.

label_indications: Obstructive sleep apnea in adults with obesity

a1c_above_goal.label: HbA1c above goal or need for additional glycemic control

metformin_trial_or_intolerance.label: Metformin trial, contraindication, or intolerance documented

other_dm_therapy_trial.label: Prior diabetes therapy documented if step therapy applies

weight_program.label: Reduced-calorie diet, activity, or structured weight-management attempt documented

weight_history.label: Baseline weight and follow-up weight trend documented

osa_moderate_severe.label: Moderate-to-severe obstructive sleep apnea documented, when using OSA indication

cvd_obesity.label: Established cardiovascular disease or risk factor documented if policy requires it

contra_mtc_men2_clear.label: No personal/family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or MEN2

no_t1dm.label: Not being used for type 1 diabetes or diabetic ketoacidosis

renal_function.label: Renal function available if clinically relevant

pancreatitis_history.label: Pancreatitis/gallbladder history reviewed if clinically relevant
